articles.title: Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire as SpaceX soars in stock market debut
articles.description: Musk is now worth $1.11tn according to the Bloomberg rich list, while SpaceX listed on the Nasdaq stock exchange with a value of $2.2tn.

articles.title: Deal to end fighting would lead to Hormuz reopening, Iran says
articles.description: The deal which will pave the way for hostilities to end is close to being finalised, the US, Iran and mediators Pakistan say.

articles.title: Rugby star Sinfield and authors Blackman and Donaldson lead honours list
articles.description: Noughts & Crosses author Malorie Blackman and Gruffalo creator Julia Donaldson are made dames, as the rugby lead star is knighted.

articles.title: I have a duty to stay on, says Starmer, as he justifies defence spending decisions
articles.description: Sir Keir Starmer argues he has made "hard-edged" decisions, one day after his defence secretary quit in a row over money.
